summary: First comprehensive test run of FIFA Tournament Tracker. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All major UI flows working correctly. Data seeded successfully with 4 players, 2 editions (FC 25, FC 26), 16 championships, 8 cups, 128 matches. Mobile UI renders correctly on 430x900 viewport.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from responses
Frontend uses proper React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
Mobile-first design with proper spacing and touch targets
seed_data_creation: Demo data seeded via POST /api/seed: 4 players (Franco, Tute, Tocruz, Rath), 2 editions (FC 25, FC 26), 16 championships, 8 cups, 128 matches. Additional test data created during backend tests (TEST_NewPlayer, TEST_UpdatePlayer, TEST_FC 27, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs tested comprehensively. Frontend UI tested on mobile viewport (430x900). Navigation, player profiles, edition details, history, and quick actions all functional. Test data may accumulate from backend tests - consider resetting DB before next test run if clean state needed.

key_validations: POST /api/seed resets and loads demo data correctly
GET /api/dashboard returns correct structure and counts
GET /api/editions/{id}/summary returns ranking sorted by championships
POST /api/players creates player and persists correctly
GET /api/players/{id}/profile returns stats, badges, by_edition breakdown
GET /api/championships/{id} returns standings sorted by points
POST /api/matches adds match and updates standings
POST /api/cups creates cup with SF bracket structure
POST /api/cups/{id}/match advances winner to next round and loser to Tercer Puesto
GET /api/history returns editions, championships, cups, players, records

tested_features: Dashboard stats display (players, editions, championships, cups, matches)
Top ranking card with player rankings
Players list with all 4 seeded players visible
Player profile with stats, badges, by-edition breakdown
Editions list with FC 25 and FC 26
Quick action buttons (New Championship, New Cup, New Player, Rivalries)
navigation_tested: Bottom nav: Home → Players → Editions → History → Home
frontend_test_details.testid_coverage: All major interactive elements have testID attributes
frontend_test_details.react_native_components: Properly using View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, SafeAreaView
